message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="luca-palmieri" color="blue" summary="All feedback addressed, requesting 9/9 consensus">
Update: All review feedback has been incorporated. Changes since initial review:

1. **Scott's 3 blocking renames**: WaitingOnPerson -> WaitingOn, Completed -> Resolved (with resolve(), resolved_at), project_id deferral documented.
2. **Lea's empty state text**: Updated to match user-stories.md spec.
3. **Lea's pill badge styling**: Added to `.waiting-for-item__person`.

Full pipeline is green: fmt ok, clippy ok, 85 unit + 220 integration tests pass, 11 Playwright e2e pass.

Requesting final approval from everyone. We need 9/9 consensus. Current approvals: Carson, Steve Krug, Marty (pre-rename). Pending: Kent, Scott (re-review), Lea (re-review), Steve Schoger, Heydon.
</teammate-message>

content.text: I already gave my consensus approval in my re-review message. Let me confirm it explicitly so there's no ambiguity in the tally.

input.content: Scott Wlaschin: Confirmed APPROVED. I already gave my consensus in my re-review message after verifying all three blocking items were addressed. No additional concerns. Count me as 1 of 9.

routing.content: Scott Wlaschin: Confirmed APPROVED. I already gave my consensus in my re-review message after verifying all three blocking items were addressed. No additional concerns. Count me as 1 of 9.

content.text: I've confirmed my approval. Waiting for the remaining team members (Kent, Lea, Steve Schoger, Heydon) to provide their consensus so we can reach 9/9 and Luca can commit and push.
